name: @ggw/spike-opa-policy
description: SPK-OPA Policy Spike — packages/contracts fixtures 驱动的 PolicyDecision {allow, require_approval, reason_codes[]} 验证（M1 计划 SPK-OPA 行）。独立 package，不进入仓库 pnpm workspace。

scripts.test: npm run build:inputs && npm run validate:inputs && npm run opa:test && npm run opa:eval
